translations.vi: Tôi nhẹ nhàng vuốt ve con mèo.
translations.hi: मैं बिल्ली को धीरे से सहलाता हूँ.
translations.ja: 私は猫を優しく撫でます。

sentences.target: Vous aimez caresser votre chien au parc.
sentences.reading: /vu z‿ɛme kaʁese vɔtʁ ʃjɛ̃ o paʁk/

translations.fr: Vous aimez caresser votre chien au parc.
translations.ipa: /vu z‿ɛme kaʁese vɔtʁ ʃjɛ̃ o paʁk/
translations.en: You like petting your dog at the park.
translations.es: Te gusta acariciar a tu perro en el parque.
translations.de: Du streichelst gern deinen Hund im Park.
translations.it: Ti piace accarezzare il tuo cane al parco.
translations.ko: 당신은 공원에서 자신의 개를 쓰다듬는 것을 좋아합니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 你喜欢在公园抚摸你的狗。
translations.yue: 你鍾意喺公園撫摸你隻狗。
translations.ru: Тебе нравится гладить свою собаку в парке.
translations.pt: Você gosta de fazer carinho no seu cachorro no parque.
translations.he: אתה אוהב ללטף את הכלב שלך בפארק.
translations.vi: Bạn thích vuốt ve con chó của mình ở công viên.
translations.ar: أنت تحب مداعبة كلبك في الحديقة.
translations.nl: Je vindt het leuk om je hond in het park te aaien.
translations.uk: Тобі подобається гладити свого собаку в парку.
translations.hu: Szeretsz megsimogatni a kutyádat a parkban.
translations.hi: तुम्हें पार्क में अपने कुत्ते को सहलाना पसंद है.
translations.pl: Lubisz głaskać swojego psa в парку.
translations.el: Σου αρέσει να χαϊδεύεις τον σκύλο σου στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Du liker å klappe hunden din i паркен.
translations.id: Kamu suka mengelus anjingmu di taman.
translations.sv: Du gillar att klappa din hund i parken.
translations.ro: Îți place să mângâi câinele tău în parc.
translations.cs: Rád hladíš svého psa в парку.
translations.da: Du kan godt lide at klappe din hund i parken.
translations.ja: あなたは公園で自分の犬を撫でるのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 2nd person plural (or formal singular); subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person plural; selects an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'aimez' expressing the action liked.
Possessive determiner; marks ownership of the following noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the infinitive 'caresser'.
Preposition (contraction of 'à' + 'le'); introduces a locative complement before 'parc'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: Il caresse les cheveux de sa fille.
sentences.reading: /il kaʁɛs le ʃəvø də sa fij/

translations.fr: Il caresse les cheveux de sa fille.
translations.ipa: /il kaʁɛs le ʃəvø də sa fij/
translations.es: Él acaricia el pelo de su hija.
translations.de: Er streicht seiner Tochter durch die Haare.
translations.it: Lui accarezza i capelli di sua figlia.
translations.pt: Ele acaricia o cabelo de sua filha.
translations.he: הוא מלטף את שערה של בתו.
translations.vi: Anh ấy vuốt tóc của con gái mình.
translations.nl: Hij streelt het haar van zijn dochter.
translations.hi: वह अपनी बेटी के बालों को सहलाता है.
translations.el: Χαϊδεύει τα μαλλιά της κόρης του.
translations.nb: Han stryker datteren sin over håret.
translations.sv: Han stryker sin dotter över håret.
translations.da: Han stryger sin datter over håret.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Definite article, plural; introduces the noun 'cheveux'.
Common noun, plural form; direct object of 'caresse'.
Preposition; marks a possessive/associative relation with the following noun phrase.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular (agrees with 'fille'); indicates the possessor.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Nous caressons la chienne après la promenade.
sentences.reading: /nu kaʁɛsɔ̃ la ʃjɛn apʁɛ la pʁɔmənad/

translations.fr: Nous caressons la chienne après la promenade.
translations.ipa: /nu kaʁɛsɔ̃ la ʃjɛn apʁɛ la pʁɔmənad/
translations.en: We pet the dog after the walk.
translations.es: Acariciamos al perro después del paseo.
translations.de: Wir streicheln den Hund nach dem Spaziergang.
translations.it: Accarezziamo il cane dopo la passeggiata.
translations.yue: 我哋行完之後就撫摸隻狗。
translations.pt: Acariciamos a cadela depois do passeio.
translations.he: אנחנו מלטפים את הכלבה אחרי הטיול.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi vuốt ve con chó sau khi đi dạo.
translations.nl: We aaien de hond na de wandeling.
translations.hi: हम टहलने के बाद कुत्ते को सहलाते हैं.
translations.el: Χαϊδεύουμε τον σκύλο μετά τη βόλτα.
translations.ja: 私たちは散歩の後に犬を撫でます。

Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'chienne'.

Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'promenade'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'après'.
